title: Using ThinkPad W520 and W530 with 65 and 90 watts adapter
author: jinli
content: While the ThinkPad W520 and W530 can not be fully powered with the ThinkPad 65 watts and 90 watts adapter, you can still use these power adapters to charge the battery of the ThinkPad w520 and W530 when they are powered off.
